title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXXII. Lullabies.
content:
[The following is quoted in Florio's 'New World of Words,' fol., London, 1611, p. 3.]

        To market, to market,
            To buy a plum bun:
        Home again, come again,
            Market is done.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXXII. Lullabies." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
